steps: After nucleic acids extractions, prepare two RNA aliquots and three DNA aliquots for each sample. - RNA: use one aliquot for the library preparation and sequencing process, and store the second one as a backup. If RNA quantity is <100 ng, omit backup copy. - DNA: use the first aliquot for the librayr preparation and the second one for backup copy. The third aliquot is used to produce an amplified DNA backup by whole genome amplification (WGA) by using Illustra GenomiPhi DNA Amplification Kit (GE Healthcare, Little Chalfont, UK) with the procedure described herein

Briefly, dilute 10 ng of DNA in 25 μl sample buffer and denature for 3 min at 95 °C. undetermined, DNA undetermined, Sample buffer Undetermined, Denaturation 00:03:00, Denaturation illustra™ GenomiPhi DNA Amplification Kit GE Healthcare Catalog #25-6600

Mix samples to 22.5 μl reaction buffer containing random hexamers and 2.5 μl Phi29 enzyme mix and incubate at 30 °C for 3 hours. undetermined, reaction buffer containing random hexamers and 2.5 μl Phi29 enzyme mix Undetermined, Incubation 00:03:00, Incubation
After amplification, heat inactivate Phi29 DNA polymerase during 10 min at 65 °C. Undetermined, Heat inactivation 00:10:00, Heat inactivation

In order to reduce hyperbranched DNA regions generated by WGA process, incubate amplified DNA with RepliPhi phi29 DNA polymerase without any primer at 30 °C for 2 hours. RepliPhi phi29 DNA polymerase Epicentre Undetermined, Incubation 02:00:00, Incubation
Digest by S1 nuclease at 37 °C for 30 min. S1 nuclease Thermo Fisher Scientific Undetermined, Incubation 00:30:00, Incubation
Inactivate the enzyme at 65 °C for 3 min. Undetermined, Incubation 00:03:00, Incubation
Purify DNA again with Agencourt GenFind V2 System and resuspend in 200 μl elution buffer. undetermined, Elution buffer Agencourt GenFind V2 System Beckman Coulter Genomics Catalog #A41497

Quantify DNA with Qubit dsDNA BR and HS Assays and subject to quality check by running 1 μl on 0.7% agarose gel for 60 min at 100 V. undetermined, DNA 01:00:00, Agarose gel Qubit Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher
Agencourt GenFind V2 System Beckman Coulter Genomics Catalog #A41497 Omit the lysis step
DNA Polymerase I (E.coli) - 2,500 units New England Biolabs Catalog #M0209L
DNA Polymerase I (E.coli) - 2,500 units New England Biolabs Catalog #M0209L Deoxynucleotide Solution Mix - 8 umol of each New England Biolabs Catalog #N0447S Undetermined 00:30:00, incubation
